lines.text: Clouds rest between heaven and earth.
lines.singableText: Clouds rest between heaven and earth.

lines.text: Yet you seem before my eyes.
lines.singableText: Yet you seem before my eyes.

lines.text: I long to come beside you.
lines.singableText: I long to come beside you.

lines.text: Though mountains and seas divide us.
lines.singableText: Though mountains and seas divide us.

lines.text: I still want to meet you.
lines.singableText: I still want to meet you.

lines.text: This one glance crosses a thousand years unchanged.
lines.singableText: This one glance crosses a thousand years unchanged.

lines.text: I write love into one line.
lines.singableText: I write love into one line.

lines.text: And lead it toward your horizon.
lines.singableText: And lead it toward your horizon.

lines.text: Like starlight sinking into the sea.
lines.singableText: Like starlight sinking into the sea.

lines.text: I am on this side of the clouds.
lines.singableText: I am on this side of the clouds.

lines.text: You are on that side of the sea.
lines.singableText: You are on that side of the sea.

lines.text: The more I want to come near.
lines.singableText: The more I want to come near.

lines.text: The more I fear we drift apart.
lines.singableText: The more I fear we drift apart.

lines.text: I long to come beside you.
lines.singableText: I long to come beside you.

lines.text: Even if wind scatters the years.
lines.singableText: Even if wind scatters the years.

lines.text: I still remember our first meeting.
lines.singableText: I still remember our first meeting.

lines.text: This one glance crosses a thousand years unchanged.
lines.singableText: This one glance crosses a thousand years unchanged.

lines.text: I turn my heart into one line.
lines.singableText: I turn my heart into one line.

lines.text: And chase it toward your horizon.
lines.singableText: And chase it toward your horizon.

lines.text: The clouds part and the sea sleeps.
lines.singableText: The clouds part and the sea sleeps.

lines.text: May I still hear in the wind.
lines.singableText: May I still hear in the wind.

lines.text: I would still place all my longing.
lines.singableText: I would still place all my longing.

lines.text: This one thought crosses a thousand years unchanged.
lines.singableText: This one thought crosses a thousand years unchanged.

lines.text: You are the sky I cannot finish gazing at.
lines.singableText: You are the sky I cannot finish gazing at.

lines.text: And the shore I can never return to.
lines.singableText: And the shore I can never return to.

lines.text: Clouds rest between heaven and earth.
lines.singableText: Clouds rest between heaven and earth.

lines.text: I am in the endless distance.
lines.singableText: I am in the endless distance.

lines.text: Still longing to return beside you.
lines.singableText: Still longing to return beside you.

provenance.correction: Active Mandarin timing follows the DiffRhythm 285-second LRC conditioning, cross-checked against same-vocal ASR. Sound-close ASR substitutions are corrected to the intended lyric; the selected clean render avoided the earlier credit-like outro hallucination.
